channel.title: Fireworks AI
channel.description: Fireworks AI — synthesized feed by ai-news-spider

item.title: How I shipped a month of engineering work in four days with GLM 5.2 Fast
item.description: A Fireworks engineer used GLM 5.2 Fast on Claude Code to ship a GPU-scheduler feature scoped at a full engineer-month. It took four days and $218 in inference. The full build: designing, planning, and implementing across four PRs and roughly 3,000 lines, with 16 unit and 18 integration tests passing and CI green. Setup is a one-time FireConnect change to route Claude Code through Fireworks and select the fast GLM 5.2 path (accounts/fireworks/routers/glm-5p2-fast). The bigger takeaway: when…
